title: The Bitch
writer: Georges de La Fouchardière, Jean Renoir, André Girard
actors: Michel Simon, Janie Marèse, Georges Flamant
plot: Maurice Legrand, a meek cashier married to a nagging wife, has a secret passion: he's a Sunday painter. He falls in love with Lulu, a young woman dominated by Dédé, the pimp who she works for. Dédé pushes Lulu into a relationship ...
